$comment: A3 frozen intent set — DO NOT EDIT after the freezing commit; corrections require a new versioned file (intents-v2.json). P01-P20 are the A1 intent patterns, strings stripped. H01-H10 are harder cases from the audited components: responsive scope changes, state entailment, negotiated sizing. mustInclude/mustNotInclude are semantic checks: an axis id the final string must (not) touch, or a scope shape like 'viewport-*:' the final string must (not) carry. backing declares the platform truths the intent's author supplies (the P8 obligation, same convention as the authoring contract's backing= fences); validity is judged with exactly that backing.

intents.intent: a stacked content section with comfortable rhythm and inner breathing room
a header row: controls vertically centered, groups pushed to opposite ends
a card body that never grows past its readable width
a compact chip that sits inline in running text
a chip that can be selected, with a quiet selected look
a chip currently selected (the element carries its real selection truth)
a sidebar column whose list absorbs the leftover space
one of two columns that split space equally regardless of content
a member locked to the medium size step, never negotiating
a member that grows at double weight but never shrinks
fill the parent: grow along the row and stretch across it
a stack that becomes a row on medium viewports and up
a stronger selected look only under a dark color scheme
a list with a stroke between items, never around them
a blocking dialog presented above everything on the page
a combobox popup: positioned, isolated, layered above nearby content, scrolling when tall
the arrow-key-highlighted option that the container asserts via aria-activedescendant
a tree node currently showing its children
a table column header sorted ascending
a required form field currently failing validation
a card that relaxes its inner padding when its container is at least medium
a selected look that strengthens only when the user prefers more contrast
the option the container currently points at as active, which is also selected
a field marked invalid only after the user has interacted with it
a tri-state checkbox showing the mixed state
a member that starts at the large size step but may shrink when space runs out
a member that grows at twice its sibling's weight and never shrinks
a member that fills leftover space but never gets narrower than the small size step
a column header the user has sorted descending
a member that is rigid on small screens but becomes elastic from the large breakpoint up
